title: Finite Arnoldi Iteration Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Arnoldi bad Hessenberg coefficient QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact Arnoldi replay computes h21 = 3 from the residual norm while a malformed row claims h21 = 2, isolating a compact equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional Arnoldi, Lanczos, or GMRES rows only when they add distinct orthogonalization, Hessenberg, restart, least-squares residual, or numerical-honesty pressure; keep general convergence, Ritz value theory, loss of orthogonality, and floating-point stability in Lean or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational matrix, starting vector, first two Arnoldi basis vectors, projection coefficients, residual norm, Hessenberg matrix, and exact matrix relation as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false first subdiagonal Hessenberg coefficient through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes h21 = 3.
Expose the pack through matrix computation, residual-bound, eigenpair/operator, inner-product, and exact-vs-floating learner and consumer query surfaces.
Keep general Arnoldi/GMRES convergence, Ritz value theory, restarts, reorthogonalization, loss of orthogonality, and floating-point Krylov stability marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
